translations.{user} has shared the form {formTitle} w: {user} at cumpartzidu su mòdulu {formTitle} cun tegus
{user} at cumpartzidu su mòdulu {formTitle} cun su grupu {group}
translations.An error occurred while loading the form: B'at àpidu un'errore in su carrigamentu de sa lista de mòdulos
translations.Unable to create a new form: Non faghet a creare unu mòdulu nou
translations.Unable to copy form: No at fatu a copiare su mòdulu
translations.Select a form or create a new one: Seletziona unu mòdulu o crea·nde unu nou
translations.Options should be separated by new line!: Is optziones depent èssere partzidas cun lìnias noas.
translations.Copy to clipboard: Còpia in is punta de billete
translations.Only works for logged in accounts with a: Funtzionat isceti pro contos identificados cun deretu de atzessu
translations.There was an error while adding the new: Ddoe at àpidu un'errore agiunghende sa pregonta noa
translations.There was an error while removing the qu: Ddoe at àpidu un'errore boghende·nche sa pregonta
translations.There was an error, while exporting to F: Ddoe at àpidu un'errore in s'esportatzione a Archìvios
translations.Linked file is not available, would you: S'archìviu alligongiadu no est a disponimentu, boles creare unu ligòngiu a un'archìviu nou?
translations.There was an error submitting the form: B'at àpidu un'errore imbiende su mòdulu
translations.Thank you for completing the form!: Gràtzias pro àere cumpletadu su mòdulu!
translations.You have unsaved changes! Do you still w: No as sarvadu is modìficas! A beru boles essire?
translations.There was an issue deleting this option: Ddoe at àpidu unu problema cantzellende custa optzione
translations.Cannot copy, please copy the link manual: No at fatu a copiare, copia su ligòngiu a manu
translations.Checkbox question title: Tìtulu de sa pregonta cun casella de seletzione
translations.This question needs a title and at least: A custa pregonta ddi serbit unu tìtulu e a su mancu una risposta!
translations.Dropdown question title: Tìtulu de sa pregonta a calada
translations.Short answer question title: Tìtulu de sa pregonta a risposta curtza
translations.People can enter a short answer: Sa gente podet insertare una risposta curtza
translations.Long text question title: Tìtulu de sa pregonta a testu longu
translations.People can enter a long text: Sa gente podet insertare unu testu longu
translations.Date question title: Tìtulu de sa pregonta cun data
translations.People can pick a date: Sa gente podet seberare una data
translations.Datetime question title: Tìtulu de sa pregonta cun data e ora
translations.People can pick a date and time: Sa gente podet seberare data e ora
translations.This form has expired and is no longer t: Custu mòdulu est iscadidu e no atzetat prus rispostas
translations.A long answer for the question “{text}”: Una risposta longa pro sa pregonta “{text}”
translations.A short answer for the question “{text}”: Una risposta curtza pro sa pregonta “{text}”
translations.Closed forms do not accept new submissio: Is formulàrios serrados no atzetant imbios noos.
translations.Archived forms do not accept new submiss: Is formulàrios archiviados no atzetant imbios noos e non podent èssere modificados.
translations.There was an error while loading the res: Errore in su carrigamentu de is resurtados
translations.There was an error while removing this r: Ddoe at àpidu un'errore boghende·nche custa risposta
translations.There was an error while removing respon: Ddoe at àpidu un'errore boghende·nche is rispostas
translations.Results of submitted forms will show up: Is resurtados de is mòdulos imbiados s'ant a mustrare inoghe
translations.Are you sure you want to delete all resp: A beru boles cantzellare totu is rispostas de {title}?
